title: T. ROWE PRICE GROUP DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
text: BALTIMORE , Oct. 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ-GS: TROW) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.22 per share payable December 29, 2023, to stockholders of record as of the close of business on December 15, 2023.

title: Best High Yield Dividend Stocks - From The 4 Factor Strategy
text: The 4 factor high yield strategy aims to automate the stock selection process, and offer a blend of the simplicity of ETFs with exposure to individual stocks. The strategy has generated 5 unique 20 stock portfolios, each with a starting dividend yield in excess of 4%.

text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio is a strategy that leverages the stock selection process of Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF, with a few minor twists. title: Bank stocks outpace broad market into the red as higher bond yields impact the value of their portfolios
